tools.name: lookup_representatives
tools.description: Find federal legislators by full street address (most accurate) or by state. A full address resolves the exact congressional district via Census Geocoder. Returns bioguideId, name, party, state, district, chamber.

tools.name: list_state_delegation
tools.description: List all federal legislators for a state (both senators and all House representatives).

tools.name: get_representative_profile
tools.description: Get detailed profile for a specific legislator including committees, social media, biography, and contact info.

tools.name: compare_legislators
tools.description: Compare multiple legislators side-by-side. Returns profiles for each bioguideId.

tools.name: search_legislation
tools.description: Search for bills in Congress. Provide `query` for full-text keyword/topic search (e.g. "broadband", "veterans healthcare") via GovInfo's full-text bill index; results include a congress-type-number id you can pass to get_bill_details. Without `query`, returns the most recently updated bills (optiona

tools.name: get_bill_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific bill including sponsor, cosponsors, committees, actions, and policy area.

tools.name: get_voting_history
tools.description: Get a legislator's recent voting record. Returns vote ID, bill info, position, result, and date.

tools.name: get_vote_record
tools.description: Get details about a specific House roll call vote including all member positions. Note: only House votes are available via this tool.

tools.name: get_campaign_finance
tools.description: Get FEC campaign finance data for a legislator including total raised/spent, PAC contributions, and industry breakdown.

tools.name: search_lobbying
tools.description: Search Senate LDA lobbying filings. Returns registrant, client, spending amount, and issue codes.

tools.name: get_federal_spending
tools.description: Get federal contracts and grants for a congressional district from USASpending.gov.

tools.name: analyze_vote_prediction
tools.description: ML-based vote prediction analysis. Returns independence score (how often a legislator votes against their donor-predicted position), SHAP factors, and notable deviations.

tools.name: get_influence_chain
tools.description: Trace lobbying money through contributions, committee assignments, and votes for a legislator. Shows the path from lobbying org to legislative outcome.

tools.name: analyze_district_comprehensive
tools.description: District representative info combined with STATE-level context across domains: environment (EPA), safety (FEMA, CFPB), health (CMS), economy (EIA, education, research, banking). Domain counts are statewide aggregates — these sources do not publish district-level rollups.

tools.name: analyze_industry_regulatory_landscape
tools.description: For a given industry sector: all regulatory actions (EPA, FDA, NHTSA), lobbying filings, campaign contributions, and committee jurisdiction. Maps sector to agencies and oversight committees.

tools.name: analyze_policy_area_ecosystem
tools.description: For a Congress.gov policy area: related agencies, industry sectors, lobbying activity, committee oversight, and Federal Register keywords. Uses policy-area-map as the cross-domain join hub.

tools.name: get_committee_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a congressional committee including members, jurisdiction, and subcommittees.

tools.name: get_federal_register
tools.description: Search Federal Register for rules, proposed rules, notices, and executive orders.

tools.name: get_district_info
tools.description: Get comprehensive information about a congressional district including demographics, economics, and representative.

tools.name: search_epa_facilities
tools.description: Search EPA-regulated facilities by state, ZIP, or SIC code. Returns facility name, address, compliance status, violations, and penalties.

tools.name: get_district_environmental_profile
tools.description: Environmental profile for a congressional district: regulated facilities, active violations, Superfund sites, toxic releases. Includes serving representative.

tools.name: analyze_environmental_influence
tools.description: Cross-reference EPA violations in a district with lobbying and campaign finance. Maps facility SIC codes to sectors, finds lobbying in those sectors by the district rep, checks EPA-oversight committee membership overlap, and identifies environmental legislation votes.

tools.name: get_climate_data
tools.description: NOAA climate normals for a state: average temperature, min/max temperatures, precipitation, and snowfall from 30-year normal period. Requires NOAA_TOKEN.

tools.name: get_state_climate_profile
tools.description: Climate profile for a state: NOAA climate normals, severe weather event history, and the state delegation's Environment committee membership for climate policy context.

tools.name: search_fema_disasters
tools.description: Search FEMA disaster declarations by state, year, or type (DR=Major Disaster, EM=Emergency, FM=Fire Management). Returns declaration number, dates, programs, and designated areas.

tools.name: get_district_disaster_history
tools.description: Disaster history for a congressional district: FEMA declarations, recurring hazard types, total assistance amounts. Cross-references with USASpending disaster relief in the district.

tools.name: search_crime_statistics
tools.description: FBI UCR crime statistics by state and offense type. Returns actual counts, rates per 100,000, clearances, and national comparison. Offense types: violent-crime, property-crime, HOM, RPE, ROB, ASS, BUR, LAR, MVT, ARS.

tools.name: get_state_public_safety_profile
tools.description: State crime trends with national comparison, Judiciary committee memberships from the state's congressional delegation, and relevant policy area context for criminal justice legislation.

tools.name: search_consumer_complaints
tools.description: Search CFPB consumer complaints by company, product, state, or date range. Returns complaint details including issue, response, and timeliness.

tools.name: get_district_consumer_complaints
tools.description: Consumer complaints aggregated by congressional district using ZIP-district mapping. Shows top complained-about companies, products, and issues for a district.

tools.name: analyze_consumer_protection_influence
tools.description: Cross-reference top complained-about companies in a state with lobbying registrants (entity resolution fuzzy match) and campaign contributions to the district representative. Checks rep votes on Finance-related legislation. Shows correlations only — not causation.

tools.name: get_housing_affordability
tools.description: HUD Fair Market Rents and income limits by county FIPS code. Returns rental rates by bedroom count and income thresholds (very low, extremely low, low) by household size.

tools.name: get_district_housing_profile
tools.description: Housing affordability profile for a congressional district: HUD Fair Market Rents and income limits for district counties, representative's Housing committee membership, and relevant housing policy context.

tools.name: search_vehicle_recalls
tools.description: Search NHTSA vehicle recalls by make, model, and/or year. Returns campaign number, affected component, safety summary, consequence, remedy, and whether to park the vehicle immediately.

tools.name: search_vehicle_complaints
tools.description: Search NHTSA consumer complaints about vehicles by make, model, and/or component. Returns incident details including injuries, deaths, crashes, fires, and complaint summary.

tools.name: search_healthcare_providers
tools.description: Search CMS hospitals and nursing homes by state with quality ratings. Returns overall star ratings, safety/mortality comparisons for hospitals, and inspection/staffing ratings for nursing homes.

tools.name: get_district_healthcare_profile
tools.description: Healthcare infrastructure for a congressional district: CMS hospitals and nursing homes with quality ratings, representative's Health committee membership, and pending health legislation context.

tools.name: get_state_energy_profile
tools.description: State energy profile from EIA: total consumption, production, electricity generation, renewable percentage, and top energy sources. Returns production mix and trends.

tools.name: analyze_energy_policy_influence
tools.description: Cross-reference state energy profile with energy sector lobbying registrants (entity resolution fuzzy match), Energy/Commerce committee membership, campaign contributions, and energy legislation votes. Shows correlations only — not causation.

tools.name: search_colleges
tools.description: Search College Scorecard for higher education institutions by state and/or name. Returns admission rate, graduation rate, average net price, median earnings, median debt, and size.

tools.name: get_district_education_profile
tools.description: Higher education landscape for a congressional district: colleges/universities by state with outcomes data, representative's Education committee membership, and relevant education policy context.

tools.name: search_nih_grants
tools.description: Search NIH-funded research grants by state, institution, or topic. Returns project title, principal investigator, award amount, NIH institute, and organization.

tools.name: get_district_research_profile
tools.description: NIH-funded research in a congressional district: grants by state, top institutions, top-funded topics, total award amounts, and representative's Science/Health committee membership.

tools.name: search_fdic_institutions
tools.description: Search FDIC-insured banks and financial institutions by state, name, or city. Returns total assets, deposits, number of offices, charter class, and regulator.

tools.name: get_district_banking_profile
tools.description: Banking landscape for a congressional district: FDIC-insured institutions, total deposits/assets, recent bank failures, and representative's Banking/Financial Services committee membership.

tools.name: get_federal_fiscal_data
tools.description: Federal fiscal overview from Treasury: national debt, monthly revenue by category, and spending by category. Returns current figures and fiscal year totals.

tools.name: get_federal_debt_context
tools.description: Current federal debt with context: total public debt outstanding, debt held by public vs intragovernmental holdings, and record date. Useful for fiscal policy discussions.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_lobbying, search_consumer_complaints, get_district_consumer_complaints · Private data: get_representative_profile, get_voting_history, get_vote_record, get_federal_debt_context · Public sink: analyze_district_comprehensive.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_lobbying, search_consumer_complaints, get_district_consumer_complaints · Private data: get_representative_profile, get_voting_history, get_vote_record, get_federal_debt_context · Public sink: analyze_district_comprehensive

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
